name: io.github.jordanburke/reddit-mcp-server
description: E-commerce research MCP: scrape Reddit + Facebook groups (public & private), full Reddit read/write, and build Schwartz customer personas.

environmentVariables.name: REDDIT_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Reddit app client ID (optional - enables higher rate limits)

environmentVariables.name: REDDIT_AUTH_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Authentication mode: auto, authenticated, or anonymous

environmentVariables.name: REDDIT_SAFE_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Write safeguards: off, standard (default), or strict

environmentVariables.name: REDDIT_BOT_DISCLOSURE
environmentVariables.description: Bot disclosure footer: auto or off (default)

environmentVariables.name: REDDIT_BOT_FOOTER
environmentVariables.description: Custom bot footer text (used with REDDIT_BOT_DISCLOSURE=auto)

environmentVariables.name: FACEBOOK_COOKIE
environmentVariables.description: Full Cookie header from a logged-in facebook.com browser (must include c_user and xs). Required to scrape private groups you are a member of.

environmentVariables.name: FACEBOOK_ENGINE
environmentVariables.description: Facebook scraping engine: auto (default), http (lightweight), or browser (Playwright; best for private groups)

environmentVariables.name: FACEBOOK_MIN_DELAY_MS
environmentVariables.description: Minimum delay in ms between Facebook requests (anti-bot pacing, default 4000)

environmentVariables.name: FACEBOOK_HEADLESS
environmentVariables.description: Run the Playwright browser engine headless: true (default) or false
